source.title: Faltering growth: recognition and management of faltering growth in children — Recommendations
source.population: Infants and children with weight loss or concerns about faltering growth.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist pediatric care.
source.exclusions: Exact for faltering-growth assessment and feeding history; partial for undifferentiated acute poor feeding and not directly validated for UAE practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.
